labels.name: needs-maintainer-review
labels.description: Maintainer should review source, category, and privacy boundary before accepting.

labels.name: needs-source-check
labels.description: Official site, public repository, documentation, or launch page needs manual verification.

labels.name: privacy-boundary-check
labels.description: Payload should be checked for private contact, credential, customer, analytics, or billing material.

labels.name: duplicate-review
labels.description: Maintainer should compare slug, official site, and public source fingerprint with existing records.

labels.name: ready-for-human-import-review
labels.description: Validation summary is clean enough for a maintainer to inspect manually.
